---
title: Ongoing Projects
page-layout: full
---

## GitHub Organization Projects

This page provides a comprehensive index of ongoing research projects in the McPherson Lab. Our projects are organized through our [GitHub Organization](https://github.com/McPhersonLab) where we collaborate on research initiatives related to conferences, journal publications, and grant applications.

### Quick Overview

We maintain **50+ active research projects** across multiple domains including:

- **Antimicrobial Resistance (AMR)**: Genomic and clinical investigations of drug-resistant pathogens
- **Gut Microbiome**: Metagenomic and metabolomic analyses of human gut microbiota
- **Treatment Optimization**: Evidence-based approaches to infectious disease management
- **Artificial Intelligence**: Machine learning applications in microbiology and medicine
- **Biophysics & Pharmacology**: Molecular mechanisms and drug discovery
- **Health Economics**: Cost-effectiveness and ROI analyses
- **Environmental Health**: Climate change impacts on infectious diseases

All projects use standardized workflows, documentation templates, and CRediT contributor roles for transparent collaboration.

### Project Repository Structure

Our research projects are categorized and tracked through GitHub repositories and project boards:

- **[Template Project Repository](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/template)**: Starting template for new research projects
- **[CRediT (Contributor Roles Taxonomy)](https://credit.niso.org/)**: Standard for identifying contributions to research outputs
- **Conference Abstracts**: Research and abstracts for upcoming conferences
- **Manuscripts in Preparation**: Manuscripts in preparation for journal submissions
- **Grant Projects**: Grant proposals and collaborative research initiatives
- **Methods Development**: Novel computational and analytical methods
- **Data Analysis**: Ongoing data analysis and visualization projects

### How to Connect Projects

Each conference and call for papers entry in our [Research page](../index.qmd) can be linked to:

1. **GitHub Repository**: A specific repository containing project code, data, and documentation
2. **GitHub Project Board**: A project board tracking tasks and milestones
3. **GitHub Issues**: Specific issues for abstract submissions, paper drafts, or collaborative work

::: {#fig-project-workflow .center}
![](../flowchart.jpeg){width=70%}

**Project Workflow and Integration.** This diagram illustrates how research projects flow from initial concepts through GitHub repositories, conference presentations, and journal submissions. Projects are linked to specific calls for papers and conferences, with GitHub issues and project boards tracking progress at each stage.
:::
### Current Active Projects

Visit our [GitHub Organization](https://github.com/McPhersonLab):

::: {#active-projects-table-wrapper}
| Project (Link) | Target Conference | Call for Paper | IF |
|:---------------|:--------------|:----------------|:---|
| [amr-acinetobacter-baumannii](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/amr-acinetobacter-baumannii) | [IMARI Annual](https://imari.org)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[npj Antimicrobials and Resistance](https://www.nature.com/collections/cfbjiegbcg)**<br><em>Deadline: June 24, 2026</em> | 8.7 |
| [amr-klebsiella-pneumoniae](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/amr-klebsiella-pneumoniae) | [ESCMID Annual](https://www.escmid.org/congress-events/escmid-global/)<br><em>Abstract: October 15, 2025 - November 26, 2025</em> | **[npj Antimicrobials and Resistance](https://www.nature.com/collections/cfbjiegbcg)**<br><em>Deadline: June 24, 2026</em> | 8.7 |
| [mgx-mbx-abx-cdi](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/mgx-mbx-abx-cdi) | [Houston C diff & Microbiome Conference](https://www.uh.edu/pharmacy/news-and-events/events/houston-cdiff-and-microbiome-conference/)<br><em>Abstract: February 14, 2026 - March 31, 2026</em> | **[BMC Personalized Medicine](https://link.springer.com/collections/idddeddhgf)**<br><em>Deadline: August 05, 2026</em> | — |
| [mgx-clostridioides-difficile](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/mgx-clostridioides-difficile) | [Anaerobe Biennial](http://www.anaerobe.org/2026/)<br><em>Abstract: October 23, 2025 - February 01, 2026</em> | **[npj Genomic Medicine](https://www.nature.com/collections/iaadjjbbea)**<br><em>Deadline: March 28, 2026</em> | 4.8 |
| [mgx-cdi-peds](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/mgx-cdi-peds) | [Anaerobe Biennial](http://www.anaerobe.org/2026/)<br><em>Abstract: October 23, 2025 - February 01, 2026</em> | **[British Journal of Pharmacology](https://bpspubs.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/hub/call-for-papers)**<br><em>Deadline: May 01, 2026</em> | 7.7 |
| [amr-clostridioides-difficile](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/amr-clostridioides-difficile) | [Anaerobe Biennial](http://www.anaerobe.org/2026/)<br><em>Abstract: October 23, 2025 - February 01, 2026</em> | **[BMC Infectious Diseases](https://link.springer.com/collections/ffbaaggicb)**<br><em>Deadline: July 20, 2026</em> | 3.1 |
| [clostridioides_atlas](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/clostridioides_atlas) | [Anaerobe Biennial](http://www.anaerobe.org/2026/)<br><em>Abstract: October 23, 2025 - February 01, 2026</em> | **[Microbiome](https://link.springer.com/collections/fbfahacdhi)**<br><em>Deadline: TBD</em> | — |
| [ai-forecast-pharmacology](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/ai-forecast-pharmacology) | [IUPHAR Annual](https://www.iuphar.org/)<br><em>Abstract: February 01, 2025 - September 15, 2025</em> | **[AAPS Open](https://link.springer.com/collections/ifeeeaadce)**<br><em>Deadline: June 30, 2026</em> | — |
| [pcol-vcddmde-hbv](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/pcol-vcddmde-hbv) | [IUPHAR Annual](https://www.iuphar.org/)<br><em>Abstract: February 01, 2025 - September 15, 2025</em> | **[Journal of Virology](https://journals.asm.org/journal/jvi)**<br><em>Deadline: TBD</em> | — |
| [immune-izapp](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/immune-izapp) | [AACP Pharmacy Education](https://www.aacp.org/events/annual-meetings)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[BMC Microbiology](https://link.springer.com/collections/ddbhjfadca)**<br><em>Deadline: May 20, 2026</em> | 4.2 |
| [pharm-comm-ai](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/pharm-comm-ai) | [AACP Pharmacy Education](https://www.aacp.org/events/annual-meetings)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[npj Digital Medicine](https://www.nature.com/collections/hcdeibadid)**<br><em>Deadline: June 03, 2026</em> | 15.1 |
| [abx-iv-mgx-mbx-imm](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/abx-iv-mgx-mbx-imm) | [Conference on Beneficial Microbes](https://conferences.union.wisc.edu/microbes/)<br><em>Abstract: February 01, 2026 - April 08, 2026</em> | **[npj Digital Medicine/npj Digital Public Health](https://www.nature.com/collections/jaibcfdhef)**<br><em>Deadline: May 15, 2026</em> | 15.1 |
| [env-mgx-pd](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/env-mgx-pd) | [Conference on Beneficial Microbes](https://conferences.union.wisc.edu/microbes/)<br><em>Abstract: February 01, 2026 - April 08, 2026</em> | **[Nature Communications/Communications Health/Communications Biology](https://www.nature.com/collections/cafdeadabd/)**<br><em>Deadline: August 28, 2026</em> | 15.7 |
| [MicrobiomeHUES](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/MicrobiomeHUES) | [Conference on Beneficial Microbes](https://conferences.union.wisc.edu/microbes/)<br><em>Abstract: February 01, 2026 - April 08, 2026</em> | **[JID](https://academic.oup.com/idsa/pages/calls-for-papers)**<br><em>Deadline: Ongoing</em> | 5.8 |
| [ai-forecast-influenza](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/ai-forecast-influenza) | [ASV Annual](https://www.asv.org/annual-meeting)<br><em>Abstract: December 01, 2025 - February 01, 2026</em> | **[Nature Communications/Communications Health/Communications Biology](https://www.nature.com/collections/cafdeadabd/)**<br><em>Deadline: August 28, 2026</em> | 15.7 |
| [epi-hbv](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/epi-hbv) | [ASV Annual](https://www.asv.org/annual-meeting)<br><em>Abstract: December 01, 2025 - February 01, 2026</em> | **[The Lancet Infectious Diseases](https://www.thelancet.com/journals/laninf/home)**<br><em>Deadline: TBD</em> | — |
| [amr-aspergillus-fumigatus](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/amr-aspergillus-fumigatus) | [MSGERC Biennial](https://msgerc.org/2026-biennial-meeting/)<br><em>Abstract: April 01, 2026 - July 31, 2026</em> | **[BMC Immunology](https://link.springer.com/collections/ddhfibjigd)**<br><em>Deadline: June 26, 2026</em> | 3.1 |
| [amr-candida-auris](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/amr-candida-auris) | [MSGERC Biennial](https://msgerc.org/2026-biennial-meeting/)<br><em>Abstract: April 01, 2026 - July 31, 2026</em> | **[BMC Immunology](https://link.springer.com/collections/ddhfibjigd)**<br><em>Deadline: June 26, 2026</em> | 3.1 |
| [amr-lomentospora-prolificans](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/amr-lomentospora-prolificans) | [MSGERC Biennial](https://msgerc.org/2026-biennial-meeting/)<br><em>Abstract: April 01, 2026 - July 31, 2026</em> | **[BMC Immunology](https://link.springer.com/collections/ddhfibjigd)**<br><em>Deadline: June 26, 2026</em> | 3.1 |
| [amr-hiv](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/amr-hiv) | [STI Prevention Conference](https://stipreventionconference.org/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[Nature Microbiology](https://www.nature.com/nmicrobiol/)**<br><em>Deadline: TBD</em> | — |
| [amr-neisseria-gonorrhoeae](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/amr-neisseria-gonorrhoeae) | [STI Prevention Conference](https://stipreventionconference.org/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[npj Antimicrobials and Resistance](https://www.nature.com/collections/bjgbhdgcbf)**<br><em>Deadline: TBD</em> | — |
| [SpaceTime](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/SpaceTime) | [BPS Annual](https://www.bps.ac.uk/events)<br><em>Abstract: April 01, 2026 - September 01, 2026</em> | **[Molecular Pharmacology](https://molpharm.aspetjournals.org/)**<br><em>Deadline: TBD</em> | — |
| [structure-function-pharmacology](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/structure-function-pharmacology) | [BPS Annual](https://www.bps.ac.uk/events)<br><em>Abstract: April 01, 2026 - September 01, 2026</em> | **[Molecular Pharmacology](https://molpharm.aspetjournals.org/)**<br><em>Deadline: TBD</em> | — |
| [pcol-biofilm-rifamycins](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/pcol-biofilm-rifamycins) | [BPS Annual](https://www.bps.ac.uk/events)<br><em>Abstract: April 01, 2026 - September 01, 2026</em> | **[mBio](https://journals.asm.org/asm-calls-for-papers)**<br><em>Deadline: Ongoing</em> | 4.7 |
| [roi-cdi](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/roi-cdi) | [The 9th International C. difficile Symposium (ICDS)](https://www.icds.si/)<br><em>Abstract: March 10, 2026 - May 15, 2026</em> | **[Value in Health](https://www.journals.elsevier.com/value-in-health)**<br><em>Deadline: TBD</em> | — |
| [ai-microbiome-transmission](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/ai-microbiome-transmission) | [Rice AI in Health](https://www.aihealthconference.com/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[npj Digital Medicine/npj Digital Public Health](https://www.nature.com/collections/jaibcfdhef)**<br><em>Deadline: May 15, 2026</em> | 15.1 |
| [ai-amr](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/ai-amr) | [Rice AI in Health](https://www.aihealthconference.com/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[ACS Infectious Diseases](https://axial.acs.org/medicinal-chemistry/call-for-papers-artificial-intelligence-for-next-generation-anti-infective-discovery)**<br><em>Deadline: July 31, 2026</em> | 3.8 |
| [DigitalTwin-Society-Health](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/DigitalTwin-Society-Health) | [Rice AI in Health](https://www.aihealthconference.com/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[Implementation Science](https://implementationscience.biomedcentral.com/)**<br><em>Deadline: TBD</em> | — |
| [mgx-virome](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/mgx-virome) | [ESCV Annual](https://escv.eu/calendar-events/)<br><em>Abstract: February 02, 2026 - May 11, 2026</em> | **[npj Biofilms and Microbiomes](https://www.nature.com/npjbiofilms/calls-for-papers)**<br><em>Deadline: July 15, 2026</em> | 9.3 |
| [phys-hiv-lenacapavir](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/phys-hiv-lenacapavir) | [ESCV Annual](https://escv.eu/calendar-events/)<br><em>Abstract: February 02, 2026 - May 11, 2026</em> | **[Journal of Virology](https://journals.asm.org/journal/jvi)**<br><em>Deadline: TBD</em> | — |
| [DOOR-STEP](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/DOOR-STEP) | [ISPOR Annual](https://www.ispor.org/conferences-education)<br><em>Abstract: October 31, 2025 - January 09, 2026</em> | **[BMC Medical Research Methodology](https://link.springer.com/collections/hgihdahcfj)**<br><em>Deadline: July 30, 2026</em> | 5.2 |
| [roi-pipeline-antimicrobial](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/roi-pipeline-antimicrobial) | [ISPOR Annual](https://www.ispor.org/conferences-education)<br><em>Abstract: October 31, 2025 - January 09, 2026</em> | **[Pharmacoeconomics](https://link.springer.com/journal/40273)**<br><em>Deadline: TBD</em> | — |
| [cost-amr](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/cost-amr) | [ISPOR Annual](https://www.ispor.org/conferences-education)<br><em>Abstract: October 31, 2025 - January 09, 2026</em> | **[CID](https://academic.oup.com/idsa/pages/calls-for-papers)**<br><em>Deadline: Ongoing</em> | 7.3 |
| [practice](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/practice) | [ASHP Midyear](https://www.ashp.org/meetings-and-conferences/midyear-clinical-meeting-and-exhibition)<br><em>Abstract: May 30, 2026 - October 01, 2026</em> | **[Nature Communications](https://www.nature.com/collections/jhbbbdafac)**<br><em>Deadline: May 31, 2026</em> | 15.7 |
| [tx-cuti](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/tx-cuti) | [ASHP Midyear](https://www.ashp.org/meetings-and-conferences/midyear-clinical-meeting-and-exhibition)<br><em>Abstract: May 30, 2026 - October 01, 2026</em> | **[Nature Communications](https://www.nature.com/collections/jhbbbdafac)**<br><em>Deadline: May 31, 2026</em> | 15.7 |
| [tx-cap](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/tx-cap) | [ASHP Midyear](https://www.ashp.org/meetings-and-conferences/midyear-clinical-meeting-and-exhibition)<br><em>Abstract: May 30, 2026 - October 01, 2026</em> | **[Antimicrobial Resistance & Infection Control](https://link.springer.com/collections/bgbhjabeba)**<br><em>Deadline: June 25, 2026</em> | 5.5 |
| [tx-staph-bacteremia](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/tx-staph-bacteremia) | [ASHP Midyear](https://www.ashp.org/meetings-and-conferences/midyear-clinical-meeting-and-exhibition)<br><em>Abstract: May 30, 2026 - October 01, 2026</em> | **[BMC Infectious Diseases](https://link.springer.com/collections/fjheihhice)**<br><em>Deadline: July 20, 2026</em> | 3.1 |
| [tx-uuti](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/tx-uuti) | [ASHP Midyear](https://www.ashp.org/meetings-and-conferences/midyear-clinical-meeting-and-exhibition)<br><em>Abstract: May 30, 2026 - October 01, 2026</em> | **[BMC Infectious Diseases](https://link.springer.com/collections/aiffadagdf)**<br><em>Deadline: July 20, 2026</em> | 3.1 |
| [PharmacyEducation](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/PharmacyEducation) | [ASHP Midyear](https://www.ashp.org/meetings-and-conferences/midyear-clinical-meeting-and-exhibition)<br><em>Abstract: May 30, 2026 - October 01, 2026</em> | **[Academic Medicine](https://journals.lww.com/academicmedicine/pages/default.aspx)**<br><em>Deadline: TBD</em> | — |
| [tx-cdi](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/tx-cdi) | [ASHP Midyear](https://www.ashp.org/meetings-and-conferences/midyear-clinical-meeting-and-exhibition)<br><em>Abstract: May 30, 2026 - October 01, 2026</em> | **[Gut Microbes](https://www.tandfonline.com/journals/kgmi20)**<br><em>Deadline: TBD</em> | — |
| [amr-pseudomonas-aeruginosa](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/amr-pseudomonas-aeruginosa) | [North American Cystic Fibrosis (CF) Conference](https://www.nacfconference.org/)<br><em>Abstract: March 17, 2026 - April 17, 2026</em> | **[Nature Communications](https://www.nature.com/collections/jhbbbdafac)**<br><em>Deadline: May 31, 2026</em> | 15.7 |
| [mgx-cap](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/mgx-cap) | [North American Cystic Fibrosis (CF) Conference](https://www.nacfconference.org/)<br><em>Abstract: March 17, 2026 - April 17, 2026</em> | **[The Lancet Infectious Diseases](https://www.thelancet.com/journals/laninf/home)**<br><em>Deadline: TBD</em> | — |
| [MoTrPAC_plus_CF](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/MoTrPAC_plus_CF) | [North American Cystic Fibrosis (CF) Conference](https://www.nacfconference.org/)<br><em>Abstract: March 17, 2026 - April 17, 2026</em> | **[Gut Microbes](https://www.tandfonline.com/journals/kgmi20)**<br><em>Deadline: TBD</em> | — |
| [mgx-cdi-vre](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/mgx-cdi-vre) | [IDSA IDWeek](https://www.idweek.org/)<br><em>Abstract: February 18, 2026 - April 30, 2026</em> | **[npj Antimicrobials and Resistance](https://www.nature.com/collections/cfbjiegbcg)**<br><em>Deadline: June 24, 2026</em> | 8.7 |
| [amr-enterococcus-faecium](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/amr-enterococcus-faecium) | [TMC AMR](https://www.tmc.edu/events/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[npj Antimicrobials and Resistance](https://www.nature.com/collections/cfbjiegbcg)**<br><em>Deadline: June 24, 2026</em> | 8.7 |
| [amr-env-food](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/amr-env-food) | [TMC AMR](https://www.tmc.edu/events/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[npj Antimicrobials and Resistance](https://www.nature.com/collections/bbeihchhgf)**<br><em>Deadline: July 08, 2026</em> | 8.7 |
| [amr-env-water](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/amr-env-water) | [TMC AMR](https://www.tmc.edu/events/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[npj Antimicrobials and Resistance](https://www.nature.com/collections/bjgbhdgcbf)**<br><em>Deadline: July 28, 2026</em> | 8.7 |
| [mgx-abx-healthy](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/mgx-abx-healthy) | [BSAC and GARDP Antimicrobial Chemotherapy Conference](https://acc-conference.com/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[Nature Communications](https://www.nature.com/collections/ihcfhcieic)**<br><em>Deadline: May 31, 2026</em> | 15.7 |
| [mgx-mbx-glp-1](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/mgx-mbx-glp-1) | [AAAS Annual](https://meetings.aaas.org/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[npj Biofilms and Microbiomes](https://www.nature.com/collections/ihecbjhhdd)**<br><em>Deadline: May 20, 2026</em> | 9.3 |
| [mgx-immunol-regulatory-t-cells](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/mgx-immunol-regulatory-t-cells) | [AAAS Annual](https://meetings.aaas.org/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[Nature Communications](https://www.nature.com/collections/ihcfhcieic)**<br><em>Deadline: May 31, 2026</em> | 15.7 |
| [EarthEpi](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/EarthEpi) | [AAAS Annual](https://meetings.aaas.org/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[Nature Microbiology/Nature Health](https://www.nature.com/collections/bagaffbjja)**<br><em>Deadline: June 01, 2026</em> | — |
| [StormPath](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/StormPath) | [AAAS Annual](https://meetings.aaas.org/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[Nature Microbiology/Nature Health](https://www.nature.com/collections/bagaffbjja)**<br><em>Deadline: June 01, 2026</em> | — |
| [mgx-mbx-colorectal-cancer](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/mgx-mbx-colorectal-cancer) | [AAAS Annual](https://meetings.aaas.org/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[Cell Host & Microbe](https://www.cell.com/cell-host-microbe/home)**<br><em>Deadline: TBD</em> | — |
| [ai-structural-biology](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/ai-structural-biology) | [Biophysical Society Annual](https://www.biophysics.org/upcoming-annual-meetings)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[Nature Communications/Nature Structural & Molecular Biology](https://www.nature.com/collections/jbdjhghacg)**<br><em>Deadline: May 31, 2026</em> | — |
| [namd-adk](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/namd-adk) | [Biophysical Society Annual](https://www.biophysics.org/upcoming-annual-meetings)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[npj Antimicrobials and Resistance](https://www.nature.com/collections/eecajaidbe)**<br><em>Deadline: July 07, 2026</em> | 8.7 |
| [biophysics-proteins-as-complex-machines-of-physics](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/biophysics-proteins-as-complex-machines-of-physics) | [Biophysical Society Annual](https://www.biophysics.org/upcoming-annual-meetings)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[Biophysical Journal](https://www.cell.com/biophysj/home)**<br><em>Deadline: TBD</em> | — |
| [MicroSCOPE](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/MicroSCOPE) | [ASM Microbe](https://asm.org/events/asm-microbe)<br><em>Abstract: October 15, 2025 - January 21, 2026</em> | **[npj Antimicrobials and Resistance](https://www.nature.com/collections/eecajaidbe)**<br><em>Deadline: July 07, 2026</em> | 8.7 |
| [env-tx-ocean](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/env-tx-ocean) | [ASM Microbe](https://asm.org/events/asm-microbe)<br><em>Abstract: October 15, 2025 - January 21, 2026</em> | **[BMC Infectious Diseases](https://link.springer.com/collections/fjheihhice)**<br><em>Deadline: July 20, 2026</em> | 3.1 |
| [amr-staphylococcus-aureus](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/amr-staphylococcus-aureus) | [Staphylococcal Diseases Gordon Research Conference](https://www.grc.org/staphylococcal-diseases-conference/2027/)<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[BMC Infectious Diseases](https://link.springer.com/collections/ffbaaggicb)**<br><em>Deadline: July 20, 2026</em> | 3.1 |
| [amr-mycobacterium-tuberculosis](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/amr-mycobacterium-tuberculosis) | TBD<br><em>Abstract: TBD</em> | **[BMC Microbiology](https://link.springer.com/collections/bajaefecgf)**<br><em>Deadline: July 16, 2026</em> | 4.2 |
:::

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
  const table = document.querySelector('#active-projects-table-wrapper table');
  if (!table) {
    console.warn('Current Active Projects sync skipped: missing #active-projects-table-wrapper table.');
    return;
  }

  const INDEX_SOURCE_PATH = '../index.html';
  const CALL_DATA_ELEMENT_ID = 'research-index-call-for-papers-project-data';
  const CONFERENCE_DATA_ELEMENT_ID = 'research-index-conference-project-data';
  const normalizeUrl = (url) => (url || '').replace(/\/+$/, '');
  const indexUrl = new URL(INDEX_SOURCE_PATH, window.location.href);
  const tableBody = table.querySelector('tbody');
  const metadataByProject = new Map();

  // Sort state: default is original order
  const sortState = { col: null, asc: true };

  // Sentinel sort values: large numbers so TBD/missing entries sort to the end
  const SORT_KEY_TBD = 99991230;        // "TBD" deadline sorts after all real dates
  const SORT_KEY_ONGOING = 99991231;    // "Ongoing" sorts after TBD
  const SORT_KEY_MISSING_IMPACT = 99999; // missing/unparseable impact factor sorts last

  // Parse the first numeric value from an impact factor string for sorting
  const parseImpactSortKey = (impactStr) => {
    if (!impactStr) return SORT_KEY_MISSING_IMPACT;
    const m = impactStr.match(/(\d+\.?\d*)/);
    return m ? parseFloat(m[1]) : SORT_KEY_MISSING_IMPACT;
  };

  const parseImpactPriority = (impactStr) => {
    const m = (impactStr || '').match(/(\d+\.?\d*)/);
    if (!m) return Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY;
    return -parseFloat(m[1]);
  };

  // Convert a due_date string ("YYYY-MM-DD", "TBD", "Ongoing") to a numeric sort key
  const parseDateSortKey = (dueDateStr) => {
    if (!dueDateStr || dueDateStr === 'TBD') return SORT_KEY_TBD;
    if (dueDateStr === 'Ongoing') return SORT_KEY_ONGOING;
    const d = dueDateStr.replace(/-/g, '');
    return parseInt(d, 10) || SORT_KEY_TBD;
  };

  if (tableBody) {
    Array.from(tableBody.rows).forEach((row, index) => {
      const projectLink = row.cells[0] && row.cells[0].querySelector('a');
      if (!projectLink) {
        return;
      }

      metadataByProject.set(normalizeUrl(projectLink.getAttribute('href')), {
        order: index,
        name: projectLink.textContent.trim(),

      });
    });
  }

  const getOrCreateProject = (projectsByUrl, projectUrl) => {
    const normalizedUrl = normalizeUrl(projectUrl);
    if (!projectsByUrl.has(normalizedUrl)) {
      const metadata = metadataByProject.get(normalizedUrl);
      let fallbackSlug = normalizedUrl;
      try {
        fallbackSlug = new URL(normalizedUrl).pathname.split('/').filter(Boolean).pop() || normalizedUrl;
      } catch (error) {
        console.warn(`Current Active Projects sync could not parse fallback project name from ${normalizedUrl}.`, error);
      }
      if (!metadata) {
        console.warn(`Current Active Projects sync is using fallback metadata for ${normalizedUrl}.`);
      }
      projectsByUrl.set(normalizedUrl, {
        url: normalizedUrl,
        name: metadata?.name || `Uncataloged: ${fallbackSlug}`,
        order: metadata?.order ?? Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER,
        conferences: [],
        calls: [],
        conferenceKeys: new Set(),
        callKeys: new Set(),
      });
    }
    return projectsByUrl.get(normalizedUrl);
  };

  const createLink = (href, text) => {
    const link = document.createElement('a');
    link.href = href;
    link.textContent = text;
    return link;
  };

  const today = new Date();

  const parseIsoDate = (value) => {
    if (!value || value === 'TBD' || value === 'Ongoing') return null;
    const d = new Date(`${value}T00:00:00`);
    return Number.isNaN(d.getTime()) ? null : d;
  };

  const conferenceRank = (conference) => {
    const closeDate = parseIsoDate(conference.abstractClose || '');
    const startDate = parseIsoDate(conference.startDate || '');
    if (closeDate && closeDate >= today) {
      return [0, closeDate.getTime(), startDate ? startDate.getTime() : SORT_KEY_TBD];
    }
    if (startDate && startDate >= today) {
      return [1, startDate.getTime(), startDate.getTime()];
    }
    return [2, startDate ? startDate.getTime() : SORT_KEY_TBD, SORT_KEY_TBD];
  };

  const callRank = (call) => {
    const dueDate = parseIsoDate(call.dueDate || '');
    const impactSort = parseImpactPriority(call.impact || '');
    if (dueDate && dueDate >= today) {
      return [0, dueDate.getTime(), impactSort];
    }
    if (call.dueDate === 'Ongoing') {
      return [1, SORT_KEY_ONGOING, impactSort];
    }
    if (call.dueDate === 'TBD') {
      return [2, SORT_KEY_TBD, impactSort];
    }
    if (dueDate) {
      return [3, dueDate.getTime(), impactSort];
    }
    return [3, SORT_KEY_TBD, impactSort];
  };

  const pickBestConference = (conferences) => {
    if (!conferences.length) return null;
    return conferences
      .slice()
      .sort((a, b) => {
        const ar = conferenceRank(a);
        const br = conferenceRank(b);
        if (ar[0] !== br[0]) return ar[0] - br[0];
        if (ar[1] !== br[1]) return ar[1] - br[1];
        return (a.name || '').localeCompare(b.name || '');
      })[0];
  };

  const pickBestCall = (calls) => {
    if (!calls.length) return null;
    return calls
      .slice()
      .sort((a, b) => {
        const ar = callRank(a);
        const br = callRank(b);
        if (ar[0] !== br[0]) return ar[0] - br[0];
        if (ar[1] !== br[1]) return ar[1] - br[1];
        if (ar[2] !== br[2]) return ar[2] - br[2];
        return (a.journal || '').localeCompare(b.journal || '');
      })[0];
  };

  const appendConferenceCellContent = (cell, conference) => {
    if (!conference) {
      cell.textContent = 'TBD';
      cell.appendChild(document.createElement('br'));
      const em = document.createElement('em');
      em.textContent = 'Abstract: TBD';
      cell.appendChild(em);
      return;
    }

    cell.appendChild(createLink(conference.url, conference.name));
    cell.appendChild(document.createElement('br'));
    const em = document.createElement('em');
    em.textContent = `Abstract: ${conference.abstractDisplay || 'TBD'}`;
    cell.appendChild(em);
  };

  const appendCallCellContent = (cell, call) => {
    if (!call) {
      cell.textContent = '—';
      return;
    }

    const strong = document.createElement('strong');
    strong.appendChild(createLink(call.website, call.journal));
    cell.appendChild(strong);
    cell.appendChild(document.createElement('br'));

    const em = document.createElement('em');
    em.textContent = `Deadline: ${call.displayDate}`;
    cell.appendChild(em);
  };

  // Add sortable column headers (Call for Paper = col 3, IF = col 4)
  const addSortableHeaders = () => {
    const thead = table.querySelector('thead tr');
    if (!thead) return;

    const style = document.createElement('style');
    style.textContent = `
      #active-projects-table-wrapper table th.apt-sortable {
        cursor: pointer;
        user-select: none;
        white-space: nowrap;
      }
      #active-projects-table-wrapper table th.apt-sortable:hover {
        background-color: #cce5ff;
      }
      .apt-sort-indicator { display: inline-block; margin-left: 4px; font-size: 11px; opacity: 0.7; }
    `;
    document.head.appendChild(style);

    [
      { colIndex: 1, colKey: 'confDate', title: 'Sort by Target Conference date' },
      { colIndex: 2, colKey: 'date', title: 'Sort by Call for Paper due date' },
      { colIndex: 3, colKey: 'impact', title: 'Sort by Impact Factor' },
    ].forEach(({ colIndex, colKey, title }) => {
      const th = thead.cells[colIndex];
      if (!th) return;
      th.classList.add('apt-sortable');
      th.dataset.sortCol = colKey;
      th.title = title;
      const indicator = document.createElement('span');
      indicator.className = 'apt-sort-indicator';
      indicator.textContent = '⇅';
      th.appendChild(indicator);
      th.addEventListener('click', () => {
        if (sortState.col === colKey) {
          sortState.asc = !sortState.asc;
        } else {
          sortState.col = colKey;
          sortState.asc = colKey !== 'impact';
        }
        applySort();
        updateSortIndicators();
      });
    });
  };

  const updateSortIndicators = () => {
    const thead = table.querySelector('thead tr');
    if (!thead) return;
    [1, 2, 3].forEach((colIndex) => {
      const th = thead.cells[colIndex];
      if (!th) return;
      const ind = th.querySelector('.apt-sort-indicator');
      if (!ind) return;
      const colKey = th.dataset.sortCol;
      ind.textContent = sortState.col === colKey ? (sortState.asc ? '▼' : '▲') : '⇅';
    });
  };

  const applySort = () => {
    if (!tableBody) return;
    const rows = Array.from(tableBody.rows);
    rows.sort((a, b) => {
      let av, bv;
      if (sortState.col === 'date') {
        av = parseFloat(a.dataset.sortDate) || SORT_KEY_TBD;
        bv = parseFloat(b.dataset.sortDate) || SORT_KEY_TBD;
      } else if (sortState.col === 'impact') {
        av = parseFloat(a.dataset.sortImpact) || SORT_KEY_MISSING_IMPACT;
        bv = parseFloat(b.dataset.sortImpact) || SORT_KEY_MISSING_IMPACT;
      } else if (sortState.col === 'confDate') {
        av = parseFloat(a.dataset.sortConfDate) || SORT_KEY_TBD;
        bv = parseFloat(b.dataset.sortConfDate) || SORT_KEY_TBD;
      } else {
        av = parseFloat(a.dataset.sortOrder) || 0;
        bv = parseFloat(b.dataset.sortOrder) || 0;
      }
      return sortState.asc ? av - bv : bv - av;
    });
    rows.forEach((row) => tableBody.appendChild(row));
  };

  const rebuildActiveProjectsTable = (conferenceData, callData) => {
    if (!tableBody) {
      return;
    }

    const projectsByUrl = new Map();

    conferenceData.forEach((conference) => {
      (conference.projects || []).forEach((projectUrl) => {
        const project = getOrCreateProject(projectsByUrl, projectUrl);
        const conferenceKey = `${conference.name}|${conference.url}`;
        if (!project.conferenceKeys.has(conferenceKey)) {
          project.conferenceKeys.add(conferenceKey);
          project.conferences.push({
            name: conference.name,
            url: conference.url,
            abstractDisplay: conference.abstract_display || 'TBD',
            startDate: conference.start_date || '',
            abstractClose: conference.abstract_close || '',
          });
        }
      });
    });

    callData.forEach((call) => {
      (call.projects || []).forEach((projectUrl) => {
        const project = getOrCreateProject(projectsByUrl, projectUrl);
        const callKey = `${call.journal}|${call.website}|${call.display_date}`;
        if (!project.callKeys.has(callKey)) {
          project.callKeys.add(callKey);
          project.calls.push({
            journal: call.journal,
            website: call.website,
            displayDate: call.display_date,
            impact: call.impact || '',
            dueDate: call.due_date || 'TBD',
          });
        }
      });
    });

    const rows = Array.from(projectsByUrl.values())
      .sort((left, right) => {
        if (left.order !== right.order) {
          return left.order - right.order;
        }
        return left.name.localeCompare(right.name);
      });

    if (!rows.length) {
      console.warn('Current Active Projects sync from the Research page data produced no rows; keeping existing table.');
      return;
    }

    const fragment = document.createDocumentFragment();

    rows.forEach((project) => {
      const row = document.createElement('tr');
      const bestConference = pickBestConference(project.conferences);
      const bestCall = pickBestCall(project.calls);

      // Compute sort values for this row
      const callDateSortKey = bestCall ? parseDateSortKey(bestCall.dueDate) : parseDateSortKey('TBD');
      const callImpactSortKey = bestCall ? parseImpactSortKey(bestCall.impact) : SORT_KEY_MISSING_IMPACT;
      const confDateSortKey = bestConference ? parseDateSortKey(bestConference.startDate || 'TBD') : SORT_KEY_TBD;

      row.dataset.sortOrder = String(project.order);
      row.dataset.sortDate = String(callDateSortKey);
      row.dataset.sortImpact = String(callImpactSortKey);
      row.dataset.sortConfDate = String(confDateSortKey);

      const projectCell = document.createElement('td');
      projectCell.appendChild(createLink(project.url, project.name));
      row.appendChild(projectCell);

      const conferenceCell = document.createElement('td');
      appendConferenceCellContent(conferenceCell, bestConference);
      row.appendChild(conferenceCell);

      const callCell = document.createElement('td');
      appendCallCellContent(callCell, bestCall);
      row.appendChild(callCell);

      // IF column: show the selected best call impact factor
      const ifCell = document.createElement('td');
      const ifValue = bestCall ? ((bestCall.impact && bestCall.impact !== 'N/A') ? bestCall.impact : '—') : '—';
      ifCell.textContent = ifValue;
      row.appendChild(ifCell);

      fragment.appendChild(row);
    });

    tableBody.replaceChildren(fragment);

    // Re-apply current sort after rebuild
    if (sortState.col) {
      applySort();
    }
  };

  addSortableHeaders();

  fetch(indexUrl.toString())
    .then((response) => {
      if (!response.ok) {
        throw new Error(`Unable to load ${indexUrl.pathname} (${response.status})`);
      }
      return response.text();
    })
    .then((html) => {
      const indexDocument = new DOMParser().parseFromString(html, 'text/html');
      const conferenceDataElement = indexDocument.getElementById(CONFERENCE_DATA_ELEMENT_ID);
      const callDataElement = indexDocument.getElementById(CALL_DATA_ELEMENT_ID);
      if (!conferenceDataElement || !callDataElement) {
        throw new Error(`Missing project sync data in ${indexUrl.pathname}.`);
      }
      rebuildActiveProjectsTable(
        JSON.parse(conferenceDataElement.textContent),
        JSON.parse(callDataElement.textContent),
      );
    })
    .catch((error) => {
      console.warn('Current Active Projects sync from the Research page data failed:', error);
    });
});
</script>
```

### Grants

For more information about NIH funding opportunities, visit [NIH Funding Opportunities](https://grants.nih.gov/funding/explore-nih-opportunities).

- [Large Research Projects for Combating Antibiotic-Resistant Bacteria (CARB) (R01)](https://simpler.grants.gov/opportunity/334655) — AHRQ | Close: Oct 30, 2026
- [AHRQ Mentored Clinical Scientist Research Career Development Award (K08)](https://simpler.grants.gov/opportunity/ef9627c9-6dd2-4dc8-a415-ab06d29093ca) — AHRQ | Close: Feb 12, 2027
- [Medical Scientist Training Program (MSTP) (T32)](https://simpler.grants.gov/opportunity/15a7a4eb-9a7e-4737-a6e1-7c3a45194e3d) — NIH/NIGMS | Close: Jan 25, 2027
- [NARMS Cooperative Agreement Program to Strengthen Antibiotic Resistance Surveillance in Retail Food Specimens](https://simpler.grants.gov/opportunity/14c2b96f-e210-4856-8901-f8278996198a) — FDA | Close: Apr 1, 2027
- [NIH Small Research Grant Program (Parent R03 Clinical Trial Not Allowed)](https://simpler.grants.gov/opportunity/357805) — NIH | Close: Jan 8, 2028
- [Investigator Initiated Innovation in Computational Genomics and Data Science (R01 Clinical Trial Not Allowed)](https://simpler.grants.gov/opportunity/357194) — NIH/NHGRI & NLM | Close: Sep 8, 2027
- [NEI Research Grant for Vision-Related Secondary Data Analysis (R21 Clinical Trial Not Allowed)](https://simpler.grants.gov/opportunity/4767321c-d902-4914-b62d-48bd9453cbd1) — NIH/NEI | Close: Oct 16, 2027
- [Accelerating the Pace of Substance Use Research Using Existing Data (R21 Clinical Trial Not Allowed)](https://simpler.grants.gov/opportunity/357545) — NIH/NIDA | Close: Dec 3, 2027
- [Economic and Modeling Analyses to Support Immunization Policy and Programs](https://simpler.grants.gov/opportunity/5f66747e-3c8a-4920-a9f4-0f398a5c91ce) — CDC | Close: TBD
- [Summer Institute for Research Education in Biostatistics and Data Science](https://simpler.grants.gov/opportunity/bfc61fde-b048-4f6f-8a14-15e6d2abdc30) — NIH/NHLBI | Close: Jul 1, 2026

### Contributing to Projects

Lab members and collaborators can contribute to projects by following these steps:

1. **Start a New Project**:
   - Fork or use the [Template Project Repository](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/template)
   - Set up project structure with README, data directories, and analysis scripts
   - Define contributor roles using [CRediT taxonomy](https://credit.niso.org/)

2. **Link to Opportunities**:
   - Add the project to relevant [conference](conferences.qmd) entries
   - Associate with [calls for papers](callforpapers.qmd) that match the research topic
   - The project table above will sync its target venues from the Research page data

3. **Track Progress**:
   - Use GitHub Issues for tasks, bugs, and feature requests
   - Maintain a GitHub Project Board for milestone tracking
   - Document progress in regular commits with meaningful messages

4. **Collaborate Effectively**:
   - Submit pull requests for code review
   - Participate in discussions on issues and PRs
   - Follow lab coding standards and documentation guidelines

5. **Prepare for Submission**:
   - Ensure all analyses are reproducible
   - Complete documentation and data availability statements
   - Prepare manuscripts using lab templates

### Project Resources

- **GitHub Organization**: [McPherson Lab on GitHub](https://github.com/McPhersonLab)
- **CRediT Roles**: [Contributor Roles Taxonomy](https://credit.niso.org/)
- **Template Repository**: [Project Template](https://github.com/mcphersonlab/template)

### Project Categories and Prefixes

Our projects use standardized naming conventions:

- `amr-*`: Antimicrobial resistance studies
- `mgx-*`: Metagenomics and microbiome research
- `tx-*`: Treatment and therapeutic interventions
- `ai-*`: Artificial intelligence and machine learning
- `cost-*` or `roi-*`: Health economics and cost-effectiveness
- `biophysics-*`: Structural biology and biophysics
- `structure-function-*`: Pharmacology and drug design

---

**Questions or want to join a project?** Contact [jacobmcpherson@utexas.edu](mailto:jacobmcpherson@utexas.edu)

**Browse all repositories**: [https://github.com/McPhersonLab](https://github.com/McPhersonLab)
___BEGIN___COMMAND_DONE_MARKER___0
